case_title: MINA METALS COMPANY INC.HUNTERS POINT SHIPYARD 404 VS CULLEN SHEET METAL INC., et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-02-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CULLEN SHEET METAL INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINA METALS COMPANY INC.HUNTERS POINT SHIPYARD 404 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CULLEN SHEET METAL INC.
